시편 42:1.content: As the deer pants for the water brooks, so my soul pants after you, God.

시편 42:2.content: My soul thirsts for God, for the living God. When shall I come and appear before God?

시편 42:3.content: My tears have been my food day and night, while they continually ask me, “Where is your God?”

시편 42:4.content: These things I remember, and pour out my soul within me, how I used to go with the crowd, and led them to God’s house, with the voice of joy and praise, a multitude keeping a holy day.

시편 42:5.content: Why are you in despair, my soul? Why are you disturbed within me? Hope in God! For I shall still praise him for the saving help of his presence.

시편 42:6.content: My God, my soul is in despair within me. Therefore I remember you from the land of the Jordan, the heights of Hermon, from the hill Mizar.

시편 42:7.content: Deep calls to deep at the noise of your waterfalls. All your waves and your billows have swept over me.

시편 42:8.content: Yahweh will command his loving kindness in the daytime. In the night his song shall be with me: a prayer to the God of my life.

시편 42:9.content: I will ask God, my rock, “Why have you forgotten me? Why do I go mourning because of the oppression of the enemy?”

시편 42:10.content: As with a sword in my bones, my adversaries reproach me, while they continually ask me, “Where is your God?”

시편 42:11.content: Why are you in despair, my soul? Why are you disturbed within me? Hope in God! For I shall still praise him, the saving help of my countenance, and my God.
